query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "omniretrieval: unified retrieval across heterogeneous knowledge source" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring the generalizability of core retrieval mechanisms (dense vs. sparse, query expansion, hard negative sampling) from standard document/passage domains to the dialogue response domain, which is a critical component of the "heterogeneous knowledge source" and "linguistics" aspects of the user's question regarding OmniRetrieval.
